basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) Project Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 14-05-2026 on the official website SVNIT. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SVNIT Project Engineer Recruitment 2026. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. (Civil) along with M.E./M.Tech. (Structural Engineering), Post Graduation in Structure Design, and minimum 4 years experience after post graduation are eligible to apply for these Project Engineer vacancies. The walk-in interview for SVNIT Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 22-05-2026. Candida

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. (Civil) with M.E./M.Tech (Structural Engineering), Post Graduation in Structure Design, Minimum 4 years experience after post graduation
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. (Civil) with M.E./M.Tech (Structural Engineering) and Post Graduation in Structure Design with minimum 4 years experience after post graduation.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for SVNIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the SVNIT Recruitment 2026 is Full Time Project Engineer. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Full Time Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Full Time Project Engineer post at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly without prior online application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Full Time Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Full Time Project Engineer position will receive a salary of Rs. 35,000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Full Time Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.E./B.Tech. (Civil) with M.E./M.Tech (Structural Engineering) and Post Graduation in Structure Design, along with a minimum of 4 years of experience after post-graduation.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SVNIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Full Time Project Engineer post is scheduled to be held on 22nd May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue for the Walk-in Interview is Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat, Gujarat. Specific details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).
